title: Eight Hundred Leagues Down the Amazon
original_title: Eight Hundred Leagues Down the Amazon
overview: Outlaw Joam Garral makes a clandestine journey down the crocodile and piranha infested Amazon river to attend his daughter's marriage. Not only must he brave the dangers of the Amazonian jungles, but also the bounty hunter hot on his trail.
